West Yellowstone, Montana
⭐ 4.4 · 778 reviews
Three Bear Lodge
217 Yellowstone Ave · West Yellowstone, MT

A beloved West Yellowstone landmark just steps from Yellowstone National Park's west entrance. Three Bear Lodge offers rustic Montana charm with modern comfort — featuring an onsite restaurant with acclaimed breakfast buffet, a lounge, and hot tub. The perfect base for exploring Old Faithful, wildlife corridors, and geothermal wonders. Walking distance to snowmobile rentals and town attractions.

Home2 Suites by Hilton Helena
3325 N Sanders St · Helena, MT

A modern, extended-stay Hilton property praised for its spacious suites, clean contemporary rooms, and one of the best complimentary breakfasts in Helena — featuring made-to-order egg bites, stuffed croissants, fresh waffles, and rotating daily options. Located on the north side of Helena with easy freeway access. An excellent value at any price point with strong repeat-guest ratings.

Best Western Premier Helena Great Northern Hotel
835 Great Northern Blvd · Helena, MT

Helena's most-reviewed hotel and a consistent top performer in guest satisfaction. The Great Northern is centrally located in downtown Helena near the historic Great Northern Town Center — steps from shops, dining, and local attractions. Guests frequently highlight the welcoming staff, outstanding breakfast with fresh waffles and fruit, and exceptionally comfortable rooms. A great choice for those wanting a downtown experience.

Fairfield Inn & Suites Helena North
2007 N Oakes St · Helena, MT

A recently renovated Marriott-branded property on the north side of Helena offering modern rooms and suite layouts at a competitive price point. Features an indoor pool, hot tub, fitness center, and complimentary breakfast. Best suited as a practical, affordable overnight stop with convenient freeway access. Our price represents the strongest savings of all Helena options — a solid budget-friendly choice.

Calgary, Alberta, Canada

Travelodge by Wyndham Calgary South
7012 Macleod Trail South · Calgary, AB, Canada

A budget-friendly overnight option on Calgary's south Macleod Trail corridor — conveniently located with easy access to Calgary's main routes. Operated by Wyndham, this property serves as a practical rest stop for travelers passing through on the way to or from Banff and the Canadian Rockies. Best suited for a short, no-frills overnight stay. Note that reviews are mixed — recommended primarily for its location and our heavily discounted rate.
